name: Invert Timelines
text: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

name: Jinx - Rebel
text: When you discard one or more cards, ready me and give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Possession
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Choose an enemy unit at a battlefield. Take control of it and recall it. (Send it to your base. This isn't a move.)

name: Seal of Discord
text: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_chaos:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Yasuo - Windrider
text: [Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)The third time I move in a turn, you score 1 point.

name: Back to Back
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Give two friendly units each +2 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Call to Glory
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.Give a unit +3 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Cruel Patron
text: As an additional cost to play me, kill a friendly unit.

name: Cull the Weak
text: Each player kills one of their units.

name: Daring Poro
text: [Assault] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm an attacker.)

name: Faithful Manufactor
text: When you play me, play a 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit token here.

name: Forge of the Future
text: When you play this, play a 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit token at your base.Kill this: Recycle up to 4 cards from trashes.

name: Hidden Blade
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Kill a unit at a battlefield. Its controller draws 2.

name: Petty Officer
text: [Assault] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm an attacker.)

name: Soaring Scout
text: [Deathknell] — Channel 1 rune exhausted. (When I die, get the effect.)

name: Trifarian Gloryseeker
text: [Legion] — When you play me, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff. Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.)

name: Vanguard Captain
text: [Legion] — When you play me, play two 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit tokens here. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.)

name: Facebreaker
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Stun a friendly unit and an enemy unit at the same battlefield. (They don't deal combat damage this turn.)

name: Imperial Decree
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)When any unit takes damage this turn, kill it.

name: Noxian Drummer
text: When I move to a battlefield, play a 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit token here. (It is also at the battlefield.)

name: Peak Guardian
text: When you play me, buff me. Then, if I am at a battlefield, buff all other friendly units there. (To buff a unit, give it a +1 :rb_might: buff if it doesn't already have one.)

name: Salvage
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)You may kill up to one gear. Draw 1.

name: Solari Chief
text: When you play me, choose an enemy unit. If it is stunned, kill it. Otherwise, stun it. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

name: Spectral Matron
text: When you play me, you may play a unit costing no more than :rb_energy_3: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow: from your trash, ignoring its cost.

name: Symbol of the Solari
text: If a combat where you are the attacker ends in a tie, recall ALL units instead. (Send them to base. This isn't a move. Ties are calculated after combat damage is dealt.)

name: Vanguard Helm
text: When a buffed friendly unit dies, buff another friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Vengeance
text: Kill a unit.

name: Albus Ferros
text: When you play me, spend any number of buffs. For each buff spent, channel 1 rune exhausted.

name: Commander Ledros
text: As you play me, you may kill any number of friendly units as an additional cost. Reduce my cost by :rb_rune_order: for each killed this way.[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)[Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

name: Fiora - Victorious
text: While I'm [Mighty], I have [Deflect], [Ganking], and [Shield]. (I'm Mighty while I have 5+ :rb_might:.)

name: Grand Strategem
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Give friendly units +5 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Harnessed Dragon
text: When you play me, kill an enemy unit.

name: Karma - Channeler
text: [Vision] (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)When you recycle one or more cards to your Main Deck, buff a friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff. Runes aren't cards.)

name: Karthus - Eternal
text: Your [Deathknell] effects trigger an additional time.

name: King's Edict
text: Starting with the next player, each other player chooses a unit you don't control that hasn't been chosen for this spell. Kill those units.

name: Leona - Determined
text: [Shield] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)When I attack, stun an enemy unit here. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

name: Machine Evangel
text: [Deathknell] — Play three 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit tokens into your base. (When I die, get the effect.)

name: Sett - Kingpin
text: [Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)I get +1 :rb_might: for each buffed friendly unit at my battlefield.

name: Shen - Kinkou
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)[Shield 2] (+2 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)

name: Baited Hook
text: :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_order:, :rb_exhaust:: Kill a friendly unit. Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may banish a unit from among them that has Might up to 1 more than the killed unit and play it, ignoring its cost. Then recycle the rest.

name: Darius - Executioner
text: [Legion] — When you play me, ready me. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn)Other friendly units have +1 :rb_might: here.

name: Divine Judgment
text: Each player chooses 2 units, 2 gear, 2 runes, and 2 cards in their hands. Recycle the rest.

name: Seal of Unity
text: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_order:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Viktor - Leader
text: When another non-Recruit unit you control dies, play a 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit token into your base.

name: Kai'Sa - Daughter of the Void
text: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_rainbow:. Use only to play spells. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Icathian Rain
text: Deal 2 to a unit.Deal 2 to a unit.Deal 2 to a unit.Deal 2 to a unit.Deal 2 to a unit.Deal 2 to a unit.

name: Volibear - Relentless Storm
text: When you play a [Mighty] unit, you may exhaust me to channel 1 rune exhausted. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.)

name: Stormbringer
text: Choose a friendly unit in your base. Deal damage equal to its Might to all enemy units at a battlefield, then move your unit there.
